hint: A word that explains why something happened
sentence: I wore a jacket ___ it was cold.
The sunset over Port Phillip Bay was ___.

hint: Someone you like spending time with
sentence: My best ___ came to my birthday party.

hint: When people do something as a group
sentence: We worked ___ to build the sandcastle.

hint: Not the same as something else
sentence: Each tram route is ___ from the others.
It is ___ to look both ways before crossing.
Do we have ___ milk for breakfast?
Many ___ visit the MCG each year.
I ___ the movie was really exciting.

hint: Going from one side to the other
sentence: We walked ___ the Royal Botanic Gardens.

hint: What you say when someone asks a question
sentence: Please write your ___ on the line.

hint: Something you ask to find out information
sentence: Raise your hand if you have a ___.
